title: List of Thai ingredients
rows: เห็ดฟาง ( means 'straw mushroom ' )
Agricultural fungus ( widely ) Mostly as a kind of vegetable in any soups and curries include Tom yum , Kaeng pa , Kaeng leang , and in several stir fried dishes include Phat phak ruam
เห็ดหอม ( means 'odoriferous mushroom ' )
Agricultural fungus ( widely ) Mostly as a kind of vegetable in any clear soups or any stir-fried dishes
เห็ดหูหนู ( means 'rat 's ear mushroom ' )
Black/Judas ' wood-ear/jelly-fungus , Auricularia auricula-judae & Cloud wood-ear/jelly-fungus , Auricularia polytricha
Agricultural fungus ( widely ) Mostly as a kind of vegetable in any soups and in several stir fried dishes
เห็ดหูหนูขาว ( means 'white rat 's ear mushroom ' )
Agricultural fungus ( widely ) Mostly as a kind of vegetable in any soups and in several stir fried dishes
เห็ดแครง ( means 'cockle-shell mushroom ' ) , เห็ดตีนตุ๊กแก ( means 'gecko-feet mushroom ' )
เห็ดเข็มทอง ( means 'golden needle mushroom ' )
Golden needle mushroom , Enokitake , Flammulina velutipes
Agricultural fungus ( widely ) Mostly as a kind of vegetable in any clear soups
เห็ดขิง ( means 'ginger mushroom ' )
เห็ดขอนขาว ( means 'white wood mushroom ' )
เห็ดก่อแดง ( means 'red mushroom of Ko tree , Sterculia monosperma ' ) , เห็ดแดง ( means 'red mushroom ' )
เห็ดนางฟ้า ( means 'angel mushroom ' )
Bhutan strain Oyster Mushroom , Lentinus sajor-caju ( Synonyms : Pleurotus sajor-caju )
Agricultural fungus ( widely ) Mostly as a kind of vegetable in any soups include Tom kha kai , Kaeng pa
เห็ดนางรม ( means 'oysters mushroom ' )
Agricultural fungus ( widely ) Mostly as a kind of vegetable in any soups
เห็ดปลวก ( means ' termite mushroom ' ) , เห็ดโคน ( means 'cone mushroom ' )
Het pluak noi , Het cone noi , Het tua , Het kai
เห็ดปลวกน้อย ( means 'little termite mushroom ' ) , เห็ดถั่ว ( means 'bean mushroom ' ) , เห็ดไก่ ( means 'chicken mushroom ' )
Termite mushroom , Termitomyces fuliginosus & Inky cap mushroom , Coprinus fimetarrius
เห็ดเผาะ , เห็ดถอบ
Het tub tao , Het nam phueng , Het phueng
เห็ดตับเต่า , เห็ดน้ำผึ้ง ( means 'honey mushroom ' ) , เห็ดผึ้ง
Salmon gum mushroom , Phlebopus marginatus ( Synonyms : Phlebopus portentosus )
Het yuea pai , Het rang hae
เห็ดเยื่อไผ่ , เห็ดร่างแห
Agricultural fungus Mostly used in Tom yuea phai

description: This table provides information about various Thai ingredients, including their names in Thai and English, their Thai script representation, and descriptions of their uses in cooking. It serves as a reference for understanding the culinary applications of these ingredients in Thai cuisine.
